attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 1 AS BATCH_ID,
CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.AE_HEADER_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.APPLICATION_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.LEDGER_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ENTITY_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.EVENT_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.EVENT_TYPE_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCOUNTING_DATE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.GL_TRANSFER_DATE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.JE_CATEGORY_NAME, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_STATUS_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_TYPE_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.AMB_CONTEXT_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PRODUCT_RULE_TYPE_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PRODUCT_RULE_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PRODUCT_RULE_VERSION, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DESCRIPTION, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCOUNTING_BATCH_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.BUDGET_VERSION_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.FUNDS_STATUS_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.REFERENCE_DATE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETED_DATE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PERIOD_NAME, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PACKET_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_CATEGORY_CODE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.GROUP_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_VERSION_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.DOC_SEQUENCE_ASSIGN_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CREATION_DATE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.CREATED_BY, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PROGRAM_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.REQUEST_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.UPG_BATCH_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.UPG_SOURCE_APPLICATION_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.UPG_VALID_FLAG, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ZERO_AMOUNT_FLAG, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PARENT_AE_HEADER_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.PARENT_AE_LINE_NUM, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.ACCRUAL_REVERSAL_FLAG, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.MERGE_EVENT_ID, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.NEED_BAL_FLAG, CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
, 'CG'AS GLOBAL_NAME ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME ,'I' as ACTION_CODE 
FROM
(
 SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS
 WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY AE_HEADER_ID ,APPLICATION_ID  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME  DESC)=1
 )CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS
 WHERE CG1_XLA_AE_HEADERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
